impact: This advances the PP&D daemon recovery path by locking in the prompt guidance needed before resuming the blocked public-crawl fixture validator work, without editing crawler fixtures or adding live crawl behavior.
summary: Add a synthetic daemon self-test module for fixture-shape retry guidance after missing-field validator failures.
target_task: Task checkbox-63: Task checkbox-58: Add daemon self-test coverage proving the fixture-shape guidance appears after a failed validator reports absent fields such as missing seed URLs or missing preflight policy fields. Keep the test synthetic and under `ppd/daemon/` or `ppd/tests/`; do not edit crawler fixtures.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
